channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Projects Organizer - Sun Mar 01 17:56:48 UTC 2026
item.description:
Projects Organizer turns a messy Recent Projects list into a structured catalog with nested groups, tags, favorites, linked projects, notes, docs links, and fast...
vendor: Artem Zuev downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.github.artemzuev.project-organizer

item.title: File Closer - Mon Mar 02 04:54:02 UTC 2026
item.description:
File Closer is a JetBrains IDE plugin that lets you bulk-close open editor tabs grouped by file extension. When dozens of tabs pile up, closing them one by one is...
vendor: ichizoku downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.maruryota.filecloserplugin

item.title: tuist-runner - Sun Mar 01 13:49:07 UTC 2026
item.description:
Run and navigate tests in Tuist-managed iOS/macOS projects directly from IntelliJ-based IDEs. Features: Automatic Tuist project detection and CLI discoveryGutter run...
vendor: Kylian Vermeulen downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.kylianvermeulen.tuistrunner

item.title: Veld - Sun Mar 01 21:31:17 UTC 2026
item.description:
Professional Veld contract language support for all JetBrains IDEs. Features: Full syntax highlighting for .veld files Context-aware code completion (models, enums...
vendor: maayn downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.veld.jetbrains

item.title: FAAAH - Error Notifier - Sun Mar 01 14:30:30 UTC 2026
item.description:
Theatrical error notifications with red pulsing overlay + scream on build failure. GTA "Mission Passed" on success!.
vendor: Gaurav Thakkar downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.gtxtreme.panic

item.title: FAAAH Test Sound Player - Sun Mar 01 14:15:13 UTC 2026
item.description:
FAAAH plays customizable sounds when your test suites pass or fail.
vendor: rekaz downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: nl.rekaz.faaah

item.title: Atlin Language Support - Sat Feb 28 20:09:20 UTC 2026
item.description:
Full language support for the Atlin (.atlin) key-value data format inside JetBrains IDEs (PhpStorm, IntelliJ IDEA, and others). Atlin is a minimal, human-friendly data...
vendor: Herminal downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.herminal.atlin.plugin

item.title: Drools DRL Language Support - Mon Mar 02 12:41:06 UTC 2026
item.description:
Language support for Drools Rule Language (DRL) files, powered by the drools-lsp language server. Features Diagnostics — real-time parse error highlighting as you type...
vendor: SubhanshuBansal downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.drools.intellij-drools

item.title: Spark Test Runner - Sun Mar 01 00:56:33 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Finie downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.sparkrunner.plugin

item.title: agents-skills-finder - Sun Mar 01 20:40:27 UTC 2026
item.description:
Agents Skills Finder is an IntelliJ plugin that discovers and indexes skills from the .agents/skills directory in your project. Search skills by name or description...
vendor: Alejandro Urrestarazu downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.urrestarazualejandro.agentsskillsfinder

item.title: JPQL2SQL - Mon Mar 02 09:23:34 UTC 2026
item.description:
JPQL2SQL converts JPQL queries from @Query annotations into native SQL — directly in your IDE. Right-click any @Query annotation and instantly copy the equivalent...
vendor: Jan de Graaf downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.jtdegraaf.jpql2sql

item.title: MermaidVisualizer - Sun Mar 01 19:07:01 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: AlexTDev downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.alextdev.MermaidVisualizer

item.title: Git Worktree Hub - Sun Mar 01 18:44:51 UTC 2026
